title: Create a RPC interface as an optional replacement to tcl
body:
Currently, if user wanna interact with yosys, the only way is invoke a tcl shell to send command and receive command. The result is hard to parse, and string only without type struct informations.
So I wonder if possible to add a json/protobuf based RPC interface as a optional replacement to tcl which contains a more serializable API for other program to interact with yosys.
